description: Composition Maroon shirt made of 100% cotton, has a medium spread collar, full sleeves with single buttoned cuffs and a mid sleeve buttoned flap, buttoned flaps on the shoulders, full front buttoned placket, two pin tucks on either side of the placket, tuck decoration on the centre of the back and a curved hem Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach Tumble dry low Do not dry in direct sunlight Warm iron Year end's all about vacations and parties. Gear up and slip into the festive mood in style with this stylish shirt from arrow. The shirt is sure to flatter your silhouette, the soft cotton fabric keeps you comfortable, the pin tucks add style while you look ravishing in this shirt paired with jeans, stiletto sandals and long earrings. Model statistics Product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
